'''hafugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabatierite|sabatierite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-f-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabatierite|sabatierite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hafugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæfigith|hæfigith]] || [[word:hæfigij|hæfigij]] || [[word:hæfigish|hæfigish]] || [[word:hæfigi|hæfigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hafufuguth|hafufuguth]] || [[word:hafufuguj|hafufuguj]] || [[word:hafufugush|hafufugush]] || [[word:hafufugu|hafufugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hafuguth|hafuguth]] || [[word:hafuguj|hafuguj]] || [[word:hafugush|hafugush]] || [[word:hafugu|hafugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hafufguth|hafufguth]] || [[word:hafufguj|hafufguj]] || [[word:hafufgush|hafufgush]] || [[word:hafufguf|hafufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hafuguthu|hafuguthu]] || [[word:hafuguju|hafuguju]] || [[word:hafugushu|hafugushu]] || [[word:hafuguku|hafuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hafuguth|hafuguth]] || [[word:hafuguj|hafuguj]] || [[word:hafugush|hafugush]] || [[word:hafugu|hafugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hafuguthul|hafuguthul]] || [[word:hafugujul|hafugujul]] || [[word:hafugushul|hafugushul]] || [[word:hafugukul|hafugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hafuguthuthu|hafuguthuthu]] || [[word:hafugujuju|hafugujuju]] || [[word:hafugushushu|hafugushushu]] || [[word:hafuguku|hafuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hafuguthun|hafuguthun]] || [[word:hafugujun|hafugujun]] || [[word:hafugushun|hafugushun]] || [[word:hafugukun|hafugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hafuguthuoro|hafuguthuoro]] || [[word:hafugujuoro|hafugujuoro]] || [[word:hafugushuoro|hafugushuoro]] || [[word:hafugukuoro|hafugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
